recent_bad_license_projects.name: mzidentml-reader
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: mzidentml-reader uses pyteomics (https://pyteomics.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html) to parse mzIdentML files (v1.2.0) and extract crosslink information. Results are written to a relational database (PostgreSQL or SQLite) using sqlalchemy.
recent_bad_license_projects.author: Colin Combe, Lars Kolbowski, Suresh Hewapathirana
